# Subdirectories

# Sources
target_sources(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE
  "base-rb.cpp"
)
if(TEST_HAS_CUDA)
  target_sources(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE
    "cudaarithm-rb.cpp"
    "cudaimgproc-rb.cpp"
  )
endif()
if(TARGET Test::dnn)
  add_subdirectory ("dnn")
endif()
